_comment: Example .aify-graph/functionality.json for this repo. Copy to .aify-graph/functionality.json in any repo and edit the features. Anchors are validated against the code graph at brief-generation time — stale anchors surface in the brief's TRUST line.

features.label: Graph ingest & extraction
features.description: AST-based graph extraction via tree-sitter across 10+ languages. Walks files, builds nodes/edges, writes to SQLite.

features.label: Freshness orchestrator
features.description: Detects changed files, manages graph lock, decides whether to rebuild or update-in-place.

features.label: MCP query verbs
features.description: Graph query surface exposed as MCP tools: lookup, path, impact, callers, report.

features.label: Brief artifact generator
features.description: Static brief.md / brief.agent.md / brief.json emitted at index time. Orient substrate for agents.

features.label: Functionality overlay (L2)
features.description: File-backed feature map linking code to user-curated functionality. Anchored on symbols, files, routes, docs. Validated against the graph.
